The progesterone produced by the corpus luteum thins out the endometrium leading to onset of the menses. If conception occurs, the hormone progesterone maintains the thickness of the endometrium and the period is delayed. So, absence of the period should be the first sign of pregnancy. However, pregnancy tests should be done to confirm the suspicion of pregnancy. Sometimes, one can have the period with pregnancy. Hope this helps. Let me know if I can assist you further.
